title: OEKA201Assignment
text:
This website presents the assignments for OEKA201 completed by: - Bertelsen, Fredrik-André Hov - Yousefi, Arya - Røijem, Bendik Strømme - Lund, Kristian ## About this website The site contains our econmetrics assignmetn analysing mortality rates across US states using socioeconomic & health-related variables.
The assinment is presented in two versions: - Bjørnar’s assignment using Gretl - estimation and analysis performed in Gretl - Bjørnar’s assignment using R - the same analysis replicatied using R code
This is a Quarto website.
To learn more about Quarto websites visit https://quarto.org/docs/websites.
